metadata.title: MDETVM Pipeline Health Alerts
metadata.description: Two Sentinel scheduled analytics rules monitoring the MDETVM -> MDETVM_CL ingestion pipeline. Creates incidents if: (1) MDETVM Logic App has no successful run in 26h, (2) MDETVM_CL ingestion drops >50% day-over-day. The original third rule (Quiet KEV) was removed because the KEV correlation rule no longer creates incidents — MDVM's built-in dashboard already surfaces KEV-tagged CVEs.

properties.displayName: MDETVM Pipeline Health - Logic App not running
properties.description: Fires if MDETVM_CL has received no new rows in the last 26 hours (Logic App is expected to run daily at 02:00 UTC and ingest hundreds of rows).
properties.query:
let LastIngestion = union isfuzzy=true (MDETVM_CL | summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)), (datatable(LastSeen:datetime)[datetime(1970-01-01)]) | summarize LastSeen = max(LastSeen);
LastIngestion
| where LastSeen < ago(26h)
| extend HoursSinceLastIngestion = datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastSeen)
| project LastSeen, HoursSinceLastIngestion

properties.displayName: MDETVM Pipeline Health - Ingestion volume drop
properties.description: Fires if today's MDETVM_CL row count is less than 50% of the trailing 7-day average. Indicates the MDE Advanced Hunting query returned far fewer results than expected (often a permissions or API issue).
properties.query:
let Today = union isfuzzy=true (MDETVM_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize TodayRows = count()), (datatable(TodayRows:long)[long(0)]) | summarize TodayRows = sum(TodayRows);
let Baseline = union isfuzzy=true (MDETVM_CL | where TimeGenerated between (ago(8d) .. ago(1d)) | summarize Rows7d = count()), (datatable(Rows7d:long)[long(0)]) | summarize Rows7d = sum(Rows7d) | extend BaselineAvg = Rows7d / 7.0;
Today
| extend BaselineAvg = toscalar(Baseline | project BaselineAvg)
| where BaselineAvg > 10
| where TodayRows < (BaselineAvg * 0.5)
| extend DropPercent = round(100.0 * (1.0 - (TodayRows * 1.0 / BaselineAvg)), 1)
| project TodayRows, BaselineAvg, DropPercent

properties.description: Fires when the MDETVM pipeline is ingesting data but no KEV-matching alerts have been generated in 3 days. Deploys disabled by default. Enable this rule alongside the CISA KEV analytics rule to monitor detection health.
